title: • Category Theory = compositional semantics (objects→morphisms).
content:
• Category Theory = compositional semantics (objects→morphisms).
• Graph Grammars = dynamic syntax & discourse growth.
• Tensor Semantics = high-dimensional fusion of modalities.
• Information Geometry = rhetorical density metric (entropy of persuasion).
8. Governance:
• Immutable audit ledger (mode decisions).
• Participatory ethics via annotation feedback.
• Locale-specific semantic tables for icons & gestures.
9. Visualization Grammar:
• Hypergraph browser (layer toggles).
• Icon fields = emoji/hiero clusters linked by semantic proximity.
• Sonic typography = amplitude ↔ font weight; rhythm ↔ spacing.
• 3-axis cube: Form × Function × Intent per span.

⸻

🔄 3. “Unified Plexus Model” (schematic)

[META-LEARNING CONTROLLER]
↑↓
[SOCIOLING] ↔ [DISCOURSE] ↔ [PRAGMATICS]
↑↓ ↑↓ ↑↓
